message:
test(engine): add comprehensive Float64 and Value::Float unit tests and apply rustfmt to test assertions

Float64 unit test coverage (22 new tests):
- Float64 total ordering: NaN==NaN in total_cmp, -0.0 < +0.0
- Float64 display: NaN, Infinity, -Infinity, -0.0 → "0", regular values
- Value::Float truthiness: positive/negative values truthy, 0.0/-0.0/NaN falsy
- Value::Float typeof_name and type_name both return "number"
- Value::Float display formatting for special and regular values
- abstract_eq: Int(1)==Float(1.0) cross-type equality, NaN!==NaN,
  -0.0==+0.0 per JS semantics
- coerce_to_float: from Int, Float, Bool, Undefined (→NaN)
- coerce_to_number: Float(5.0)→Int(5), Float(3.14)→None,
  Float(NaN)→None

Rustfmt cleanup in test files:
- Reformat long chained iterator assertions in external_dependency_audit.rs
- Reformat multi-line index expressions in standalone_build_gate.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

-        ["artifacts"]

         "<timestamp>/events.jsonl",
